candidate.completion: lower your standards slowly; I’m trying to make a dramatic entrance.
candidate.sentence: i’m lonely, please lower your standards slowly; I’m trying to make a dramatic entrance.

evaluation.rationale: A clear self-deprecating turn reframes loneliness as a bid for theatrical desirability, and "dramatic entrance" gives the joke its cleanest pivot. The idea lands, but the sentence runs long and explains itself more than it snaps.

incumbent_before.sentence: i’m lonely, please put me in a group chat so I can be ignored at scale
